sources.authority: Builder-created extraction table; each row is secondary to the reviewed source and must retain its review locator.

provenance.derivation: Rows E01-E10 transcribe results, scopes, interpretations, and limitations from the named sections of the full-text review.

sources.authority: Repository deep review grounded in the immutable v2 PDF and full-text extraction; use to resolve table ambiguity.

authority_rule: Use the review to interpret the derived CSV. If the review and CSV conflict, stop and audit against the immutable PDF/text rather than silently choosing the convenient value.
freshness: Pinned to arXiv v2 dated 2026-05-29; this pilot makes no claim about later versions.
known_gap: No domain expert has validated the row selection, scenario framing, procedures, or decision thresholds.
